title: Environmental Stewardship and Occupational Health and Safety
description: Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory (LLNL) is committed to environmental stewardship and the protection of the health and safety of its employees, visitors and community. Learn about LLNL's environmental stewardship, health and safety programs and their related activities.
text:
A Commitment to Environmental Stewardship and Occupational Health and Safety
Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory (LLNL) is committed to environmental stewardship and the protection of the health and safety of its employees, visitors and community. The Lab adheres to international standards in the performance of this important stewardship responsibility. This website provides information on LLNL's environmental stewardship, health and safety programs and their related activities.
LLNL’s Environmental Policy
LLNL is committed to being a leader in responsible environmental stewardship. Environmental stewardship is integrated in strategic planning and decision-making processes and the management of work activities through the Integrated Safety Management System.
Read LLNL's environmental policy
LLNL’s Occupational Health and Safety Policy
LLNL is committed to protecting workers and the public, and to continual improvement in occupational health and safety performance using the Integrated Safety Management System. Safety and health are a priority in the planning and execution of all work activities at the Lab.
Read LLNL's health and safety policy
